allow: PowerShell($sh = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $result = $sh.Run\('cmd /c cd /d C:\\Users\\Daulet-asus\\PycharmProjects\\OtbasyCrawler && C:\\Users\\Daulet-asus\\.local\\bin\\uv.exe run python main.py > C:\\Users\\Daulet-asus\\PycharmProjects\\OtbasyCrawler\\vbs_test.log 2>&1', 0, $true\); Write-Host "Exit code: $result")

PowerShell($info = Get-ScheduledTaskInfo -TaskName 'OtbasyCrawler'; $task = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'OtbasyCrawler'; Write-Host "State: $\($task.State\)"; Write-Host "LastRunTime: $\($info.LastRunTime\)"; Write-Host "LastTaskResult: $\($info.LastTaskResult\)"; Write-Host "NumberOfMissedRuns: $\($info.NumberOfMissedRuns\)")
PowerShell(Get-Process | Where-Object { $_.Name -match 'wscript|python|uv' } | Select-Object Name, Id, StartTime)

PowerShell(Get-WinEvent -LogName 'Microsoft-Windows-TaskScheduler/Operational' -MaxEvents 20 | Where-Object { $_.Message -match 'OtbasyCrawler' } | Select-Object TimeCreated, Id, Message | Format-List)

PowerShell($t = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'OtbasyCrawler'; $a = $t.Actions[0]; Write-Host "Execute: $\($a.Execute\)"; Write-Host "Arguments: $\($a.Arguments\)"; Write-Host "WorkDir: $\($a.WorkingDirectory\)"; $info = Get-ScheduledTaskInfo -TaskName 'OtbasyCrawler'; Write-Host "State: $\($t.State\)"; Write-Host "LastRunTime: $\($info.LastRunTime\)"; Write-Host "LastTaskResult: 0x$\($info.LastTaskResult.ToString\('X'\)\)")

PowerShell($t = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'OtbasyCrawler'; $a = $t.Actions[0]; $info = Get-ScheduledTaskInfo -TaskName 'OtbasyCrawler'; Write-Host "State: $\($t.State\)"; Write-Host "Execute: $\($a.Execute\)"; Write-Host "Arguments: $\($a.Arguments\)"; Write-Host "WorkDir: $\($a.WorkingDirectory\)"; Write-Host "LastRunTime: $\($info.LastRunTime\)"; Write-Host "LastTaskResult: 0x$\($info.LastTaskResult.ToString\('X'\)\)")

PowerShell($t = Get-ScheduledTask -TaskName 'OtbasyCrawler'; Write-Host "UserId: $\($t.Principal.UserId\)"; Write-Host "LogonType: $\($t.Principal.LogonType\)"; Write-Host "RunLevel: $\($t.Principal.RunLevel\)"; Write-Host "---"; Write-Host "Current user: $env:USERNAME")
